name: Lemon-Marinated Fennel with Feta
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup fresh lemon juice, or to taste
6 - 8 ounces mild feta, drained if necessary
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim away the outer layer of the fennel, reserving the tender stalks and any feathery tops.
2. Quarter the bulb lengthwise and cut each quarter crosswise into very thin slices.
3. Cut the reserved stalks crosswise into very thin slices.
4. To make the fennel crisp and slightly curled, soak in ice-cold water for 1 hour, making sure the water covers it completely. Drain thoroughly.
5. Chop the reserved fennel tops.
6. In a bowl, toss together the fennel slices, fennel tops, lemon juice, olive oil, and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
7. Arrange the salad on a platter and chill, covered for up to 3 hours.
8. If the feta is very salty, rinse under cold water and pat dry. Cut the feta into 1 x 1/4-inch slices and arrange on top of the salad.
Yield: 4-6 servings
